Open Positions


All roles require:

• Strong written & verbal communication
• Based in the USA — Florida preferred
• Comfortable using ChatGPT, Canva,

“We’re not just hiring roles — we’re building a team of future leaders. Everyone here wears multiple hats, grows fast, and makes real impact.”
Thomas Romanelli
CEO & Videographer
Content Creator / Social Media Manager
Must know Reels/TikTok trends + tools like Canva or CapCut
Data Science / Finance Intern
Experience with Excel, dashboards, market research, and automation tools
Photographer / Videographer (Palm Beach County)
Local only — own your gear, show past shoots
Copywriter (Website & Email)
Help us write high-converting web pages, emails, and brand messaging
Computer Science Intern
AI, automation, or web tools — fast learners welcome
“Joining Local Social means more than a job — it’s a chance to grow your skills, try new things, and actually be seen for your ideas. We move fast, and you’ll never feel boxed in.”
Kat Petosa
Content Creator
